rationale: Review 1's only finding is proof redundancy (mapsTo_fiber_symm derivable from mapsTo_fiber φ⁻¹), which is real but not a generality issue; acting on it changes proof style, not generality. Review 2 correctly observes the right generality choices (Deck for any map, subgroup ContinuousConstSMul transfer), but both reviews leave the PR at identical generality.
